main.name: Sliver Gravemother
main.oracle_text:

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Sliver Legion
card.oracle_text: All Sliver creatures get +1/+1 for each other Sliver on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Hidden within the clicking, chittering swarm is a unique mind, still young, but growing more aware as time passes.

card.name: The First Sliver
card.oracle_text:
Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.)
Sliver spells you cast have cascade.

Return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.
Overload {6}{U} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")
card.flavor_text: "Oh, *that's* what that switch does!"

card.name: Three Visits
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Trying to meet a worthy man in the wrong way is as bad as closing the door on an invited guest."
—Mencius, a Chinese philosopher

card.name: Patriarch's Bidding
card.oracle_text: Each player chooses a creature type. Each player returns all creature cards of a type chosen this way from their graveyard to the battlefield.
card.flavor_text:
"Family plots are so convenient."
—Cabal Patriarch

card.name: Galerider Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have flying.
card.flavor_text: Masters of adaptation, galeriders serve multiple purposes useful to the hive. When they're not patrolling their territories, their majestic wings serve to circulate cool air through the vast hive chambers.

card.name: Predatory Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control get +1/+1.
card.flavor_text: No matter how much the slivers change, their collective might remains.

card.name: Flooded Strand
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once slept, their bones now rest.

card.name: Wooded Foothills
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons' breath once burned, their bones now freeze.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once roared, their bones now keen.

card.name: Fellwar Stone
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"What do you have that I cannot obtain?"
—Mairsil, the Pretender

card.name: Cleansing Nova
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy all creatures.
• Destroy all artifacts and enchantments.
card.flavor_text: In their final moments, the demons gazed upon grace in its purest form.

card.name: Homing Sliver
card.oracle_text:
Each Sliver card in each player's hand has slivercycling {3}.
Slivercycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Sliver card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Virulent Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Sliver creatures have poisonous 1. (Whenever a Sliver deals combat damage to a player, that player gets a poison counter. A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.oracle_text:

Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1.
Whenever you cast a creature spell of the chosen type, draw a card.

card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Greetings, tired traveler."

card.name: Mana Confluence
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Better places poured prismatic dreams into the world, rendering it anew.

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Path of Ancestry
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: Bojuka Bog
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.
card.flavor_text: There loomed against the westward stars a dark black shape: a great barrow stood there.

card.name: Cavern of Souls
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type, and that spell can't be countered.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Kindred Dominance
card.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Destroy all creatures that aren't of the chosen type.
card.flavor_text: "Today will end with a feast," gloated the dragon. And what a feast it was.

card.name: Crypt Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Slivers have "{T}: Regenerate target Sliver."
card.flavor_text:
"Someone's been tampering with the graves again. But what kind of grave robber uses a pickax?"
—Morgan, cemetery groundskeeper

card.name: Bonescythe Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have double strike. (They deal both first-strike and regular combat damage.)
card.flavor_text:
"It seems docile enough. Perhaps we could train it to reap the grain—it would be the easiest harvest season of our lives!"
—Georgina, farmer, now deceased

card.name: Brood Sliver
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Sliver deals combat damage to a player, its controller may create a 1/1 colorless Sliver creature token.
card.flavor_text: Within weeks, more slivers nested in Otaria than ever existed on Rath.

card.name: Cloudshredder Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have flying and haste.
card.flavor_text: Forked tails rustled. Talons clicked. A lone sliver streaked overhead like jagged lightning, and the hive thundered.

card.name: Firewake Sliver
card.oracle_text:
All Sliver creatures have haste.
All Slivers have "{1}, Sacrifice this permanent: Target Sliver creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn."
card.flavor_text:
"When establishing a new hive in hostile territory, slivers abandon all sense of individual self-preservation to ensure the queen's survival."
—Rukarumel, field journal

card.name: Hatchery Sliver
card.oracle_text:
Replicate {1}{G} (When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost.)
Each Sliver spell you cast has replicate. The replicate cost is equal to its mana cost. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)
card.flavor_text: A single survivor can repopulate a devastated hive within a week.

card.name: Lazotep Sliver
card.oracle_text:
Sliver creatures you control have afflict 2. (Whenever a creature with afflict 2 becomes blocked, defending player loses 2 life.)
Whenever a nontoken Sliver you control dies, amass Slivers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Sliver. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Sliver Army creature token first.)

card.name: Regal Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have "When this creature enters, Slivers you control get +1/+1 until end of turn if you're the monarch. Otherwise, you become the monarch."
card.flavor_text:
"It is possible that some queens are not born queens, but evolve into that form over time."
—Rukarumel, field notes

card.name: For the Ancestors
card.oracle_text:
Choose a creature type. Look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal any number of cards of the chosen type from among them and put the revealed cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
Flashback {3}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Taunting Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have "When this creature enters, goad target creature an opponent controls." (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)
card.flavor_text:
"The way it shakes its hood is astonishingly irritating."
—Neena, outland scout

card.name: Constricting Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have "When this creature enters, you may exile target creature an opponent controls until this creature leaves the battlefield."
card.flavor_text: Newborn slivers will sometimes wrap themselves playfully around a human's finger. They grow out of the "playful" part.

card.name: Syphon Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have lifelink. (Damage dealt by a Sliver creature you control also causes you to gain that much life.)
card.flavor_text: The hive knows no fear or mercy, only hunger.

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

card.name: Crystalline Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Slivers have shroud. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities.)
card.flavor_text: Bred as living shields, these slivers have proven unruly—they know they cannot be caught.

card.name: Diffusion Sliver
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Sliver creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter that spell or ability unless its controller pays {2}.
card.flavor_text: Its call disrupts the delicate balance of the inner ear, disorienting intruders without direct confrontation.

card.name: Distant Melody
card.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.
card.flavor_text: Oona's song is like a twisted dinner chime. All the faeries return home, but it is Oona who feasts—on the stolen dreams and rumors they serve her.

card.name: Gemhide Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Slivers have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
card.flavor_text: Squee had been disemboweled many times before, but never by something so stunningly beautiful.

card.name: Harmonic Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Slivers have "When this permanent enters, destroy target artifact or enchantment."
card.flavor_text:
"Since the last sliver arrived, even our mightiest relics splinter into shards as soon as we bring them against the hive."
—Llanach, Skyshroud ranger

card.name: Harsh Mercy
card.oracle_text: Each player chooses a creature type. Destroy all creatures that aren't of a type chosen this way. They can't be regenerated.
card.flavor_text:
"There is no greater burden than choosing who to save."
—Kamahl, druid acolyte

card.name: Hibernation Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Slivers have "Pay 2 life: Return this permanent to its owner's hand."
card.flavor_text: Mogglings have been known to play ball with hibernating slivers, completely unaware of their true nature.

card.name: Lavabelly Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have "When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker and you gain 1 life."
card.flavor_text: Warm enough to incubate eggs or incinerate those who would eat them.

card.name: Manaweft Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
card.flavor_text: Their pearlescent scales are highly sought after by those who lack the instincts for self-preservation.

card.name: Megantic Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control get +3/+3.
card.flavor_text: Slivers will swiftly adapt to fill any evolutionary niche, even if that niche is "earthshaking apex predator."

card.name: Might Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Sliver creatures get +2/+2.
card.flavor_text:
"The colossal thing rumbled over the ridge, tree husks crumbling before it. The ones we were already fighting howled as it came, their muscles suddenly surging, and we knew it was time to flee."
—Llanach, Skyshroud ranger

card.name: Necrotic Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Slivers have "{3}, Sacrifice this permanent: Destroy target permanent."
card.flavor_text: Though Volrath is long dead, the slivers have become everything he wanted them to be: mindless instruments of destruction and despair.

card.name: Pillar of Origins
card.oracle_text:
As this artifact enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type.

card.name: Quick Sliver
card.oracle_text:
Flash
Any player may cast Sliver spells as though they had flash.
card.flavor_text: The directors of the Riptide Project wanted instant results on the sliver experiments. They got their wish.

card.name: Sentinel Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have vigilance. (Attacking doesn't cause them to tap.)
card.flavor_text:
"Nine hells! How does something with no eyes see so far?"
—Max, Benalish scout

card.name: Shifting Sliver
card.oracle_text: Slivers can't be blocked except by Slivers.
card.flavor_text: Once the last few slivers the Riptide Project controlled were dead, there was nothing to keep the island from being completely overrun.

card.name: Sinew Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Sliver creatures get +1/+1.
card.flavor_text: As the muscle cords of the creature twitched, Hanna saw an unsettling unanimity in the others' rippling flesh. She didn't know what it meant, but she urged Sisay to keep the ship at a safe distance.

card.name: Sliver Hivelord
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have indestructible. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)
card.flavor_text:
"This is the source, the line unbroken since the calamity that brought such monsters to our shores."
—Hastric, Thunian scout

card.name: Spiteful Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have "Whenever this creature is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to target player or planeswalker."
card.flavor_text:
"The key to safely studying any sliver is to find out what provokes it, then absolutely never do that."
—Rukarumel, field journal

card.name: Striking Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have first strike. (They deal combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
card.flavor_text: There is no such thing as surprising a sliver.

card.name: Synapse Sliver
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Sliver deals combat damage to a player, its controller may draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"Species XR17 feeds upon the mental energies of its victims. This explains why the goblins remain unaffected."
—Riptide Project researcher

card.name: Two-Headed Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Sliver creatures have menace. (They can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
card.flavor_text: When a species becomes so dominant that no other can compete, evolution gets creative.

card.name: Venom Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have deathtouch. (Any amount of damage a creature with deathtouch deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
card.flavor_text: The venom softens tissue and liquefies internal organs, allowing the slivers to feed freely without wasting time chewing.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.name: Spelunking
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, draw a card, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you put a Cave onto the battlefield this way, you gain 4 life.
Lands you control enter untapped.

card.oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Whenever a creature you control of the chosen type enters or attacks, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Few things are truly "lost" at sea.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander

card.flavor_text: The masks float downstream toward the Mirrorlake, where faces arise to wear them.

card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text: Orwell Orchards is about as peaceful and pleasant as a tomb can get.

card.flavor_text: In the end, he marched into the desert sands, leaving the Vault behind him.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
card.flavor_text: "Tulips bring love into the world. I bring the tulips."

card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
